gated_on: G1 drill-04 dead-man detector/scenario mismatch (SQ-282): the fast-timing runtime compressed the stall ~16 h -> ~8 min (DEAD_MAN_RELAY_BLOCKS 4,800 -> 48; the first-ever run reached gap 48 in ~8 min, so timing is proven and no longer the blocker), but assert-dead-man engaged fails because observe_dead_man triggers on a relay-PARENT jump between consecutive parachain blocks (a parachain outage/catch-up signal), not a relay-FINALITY stall where the relay keeps producing and the parachain follows the unfinalized best (05 sec 4.8 F-signal VERIFY: PersistedValidationData exposes relay_parent_number, not the relay finalized head). Resolution is SQ-282 (outage-scenario drill, a finalized-head detector input, or a re-scope of 05 sec 4.8), not timing

G1 drill-05 genesis seeding + long-horizon run: the drill-side staging code landed 2026-07-20 (stage/execute/probe branches note a live authenticated quote as the genesis authority Alice and assert success + CoretimeRenewalCalled), but the funded ops.coretime budget line and treasury DOT/USDC custody are not chain-spec-fundable (fund_budget_line/set_coretime_authority need the unreachable FutarchyTreasury origin; sudo->Root is rejected, sudo_as denied) so they must be genesis-seeded (raw futarchyTreasury.State line + foreignAssets.accounts), and the exit form runs under a real 4,800-relay-block dead-man stall (~8 h, g1-tier)

G1 XCM-topology Asset Hub block production: the drill-07 spec_version readiness sentinel was retired 2026-07-20 (WP-1) and the Bleavit side boots, but the first real end-to-end run surfaced the pinned Paseo asset-hub-paseo-runtime trapping on its parachain-system inherent (AbortedDueToTrap in cumulus_pallet_parachain_system) so Asset Hub (para 1000) never produces blocks and the drill cannot reach its XCM legs; this is a Paseo chain-spec-generator/system-runtime integration issue (not Bleavit), owned by the env pins — investigate the AH+Coretime fast-runtime build before the first full XCM run

G1 freeze/proposal staging (attested queued expedited proposal + active PB-LEDGER-FREEZE at genesis, SQ-233); the ~3-day D-14 lead wait is eliminated on the fast-timing runtime (SQ-128: DESCRIPTOR_LEAD_TIME_BLOCKS 43,200 -> 12; the drill reads the live descriptorLeadTime metadata constant), so timing is no longer the blocker — only the freeze/expedited genesis staging remains
